acceptance_targets: [ch18-booker-01] Reading the revised passage from snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:57 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:264, each major sequence must produce a distinct irreversible change in stakes or options. If one of the three beats (Vignot, Saunier, copybook) can be removed without altering what gets published or what exile costs Elise, this finding remains unresolved.

[ch18-craft-01] The revised leak-selection passage at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:51 or snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:99 must show at least one identifiable living person or location being struck from the record and spell out the concrete consequence of leaving it in. If the passage can still be summarized as she redacted the dangerous parts without a reader being able to name the sacrificed fact, fail.

[FBR-008] Compare snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2683-2690 against snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6175-6179 and snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6271-6273. Pass only if all three passages now present one consistent set of Ferrand payment amounts and categories. Fail if a reader can still extract two different schedules or two different descriptions for the same copied slip.

findings.acceptance_test: Reading the revised passage from snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:57 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:264, each major sequence must produce a distinct irreversible change in stakes or options. If one of the three beats (Vignot, Saunier, copybook) can be removed without altering what gets published or what exile costs Elise, this finding remains unresolved.
findings.evidence: snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:51 establishes the hard choice as a selection problem; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:57 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:165 then stage two long gatekeeper/editor negotiations that mostly execute the same decision; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:259 restates the witness work as copying rather than forcing a new turn.
findings.problem: The chapter settles Elise's core decision early, so the middle third runs on implementation rather than fresh jeopardy. By the time she leaves her room with the notebook and payment slip, the reader already knows she will publish selectively; the Madame Vignot scene, the Saunier scene, and the copybook scene each refine the same choice instead of forcing a new irreversible turn. That keeps the ending consequential but not Booker-level volatile.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the middle so at least one of the sequences anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:57, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:165, or snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:255 changes Elise's options rather than merely processing them. Options: compress one editorial meeting into the other, or introduce a concrete new cost in one of those spans that could still derail what gets printed or whether she can afford to leave Paris.

findings.acceptance_test: The revised leak-selection passage at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:51 or snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:99 must show at least one identifiable living person or location being struck from the record and spell out the concrete consequence of leaving it in. If the passage can still be summarized as she redacted the dangerous parts without a reader being able to name the sacrificed fact, fail.
findings.evidence: snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:51 says witness requires Elise to keep harming the living by omission; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:53 reduces that act to crossing out pages in bulk; snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:105 summarizes the protected names again without forcing a concrete loss.
findings.problem: The hardest moral act in the chapter is sanitized. The draft announces that publishing the truth means sacrificing living people by omission, then renders that sacrifice as a brisk redaction montage. Because no single struck name, address, or survivor-specific detail is made concrete, the ethical violence stays cleaner than the premise warrants and scene pressure drops exactly where the chapter should bite deepest.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:51 or snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:99, slow down for one specific redaction: name the living person or trace she removes, what fact she withholds, and what danger publication would bring if she leaves it in. Keep the operational secrecy, but make the omission feel like a deliberate wound rather than generic paperwork.

findings.acceptance_test: Compare snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2683-2690 against snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6175-6179 and snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6271-6273. Pass only if all three passages now present one consistent set of Ferrand payment amounts and categories. Fail if a reader can still extract two different schedules or two different descriptions for the same copied slip.
findings.problem: Chapter 18 breaks the novel's own evidentiary exactness on Ferrand's payment record. In chapter 9, the copied Prefecture ledger gives three disbursements of 35 francs, 40 francs, and 60 francs with specific labels (`Advance for cultivation expenses`, `Supplementary indemnity upon successful introduction`, `Final payment upon delivery of material proof`) at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2685, snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2687, and snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2689. But chapter 18 turns the same slip into `Twenty-five francs. Forty. Forty. Bonus after event.` at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6271, and the surrounding summary at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6175 also redescribes the categories differently. Because the endgame is explicitly about witness, dates, and corrected public record, this contradiction is a high-severity coherence failure, not a minor copy issue.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6175-6179, snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6217-6224, and snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6271-6273 so chapter 18 carries exactly one payment schedule and one set of labels. The cleanest fix is to align the late-book references with the chapter 9 ledger at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2683-2690: 35 francs, 40 francs, and 60 francs with language consistent with the earlier Prefecture file. If chapter 18's figures are the intended canon instead, then chapter 9 must be rewritten to match instead of leaving two versions in circulation.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the contradiction that tenderness can coexist with surveillance, desire with betrayal, and ideology with vanity. Render violence, sex, illness, and poverty at the scale characters actually experience them. When an edge case appears, choose the more specific and less reputationally safe version if it remains faithful to character, period, and causality.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene reaches bodily danger, sex, grief, class shame, or political cruelty and then retreats into summary, rewrite toward the exact physical and social fact the character cannot evade.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: Moderate to high; contractions are the spoken default, with full forms reserved for period formality, deliberate emphasis, or Vautrin's cultivated precision.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate compressive surveillance chapters with slower communal or reflective chapters; vary scene count, dialogue density, and whether the turn comes from action, information, dread, or aftermath so no two adjacent chapters run on the same structural rhythm.
prose_style_profile.diction: Historically grounded and unsentimental; plain enough for labor and bureaucracy, lyrical only when perception earns it rather than rhetoric.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third centered on Elise, elastic enough to register class texture, political pressure, and the quarry's collective life without drifting into authorial essay.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple, image-bearing sentences broken by hard factual beats at moments of violence, lust, bureaucratic coercion, or shame.
